name: Through the Dust of Lira IV | Rag Tag Sci-fi Adventure
description:
🚀 Embark on a perilous journey through blockades, dust-choked planets, and moral crossroads. Every choice matters, every interaction can sway loyalty, and every mission carries the weight of lives depending on your decisions. 🚀

Meet the Crew 🧑🏼‍🤝‍🧑🏼

🛥️ Kasia – Leader of Frog Leap Freighting

Fiery red hair, piercing amber eyes, lean and strong. A no-nonsense commander who balances empathy with efficiency, Kasia demands competence and decisive action. Her gaze is sharp, but she values those who prove themselves.

🦾 Jona Unit 734 – Non-binary android, protector and support

Smooth, featureless white face with glowing soft blue eyes, lean white chassis with subtle blue accents. Calm, loyal, and analytical, Jona ensures the safety of the crew while observing and responding to subtle emotional cues.

🎅 Elias – Advisor and steady hand

Middle-aged, lean, with slightly graying hair and warm amber eyes. Experienced, calm, and pragmatic, Elias mediates tensions and guides the crew, offering reassurance and reliable strength in the midst of chaos.

🏕️ Rian – Conflicted ground contact

Lean, alert, practical clothing for blending in. Sharp features, piercing gray eyes, tense posture. Rian carries the weight of a hidden past and divided loyalties, his actions influenced by your guidance.

🦹‍♂️ Blockade Commander – The enemy in the shadows

Sleek black-and-silver military armor, angular design, piercing blue eyes, strict posture. Strategic, calculating, and intimidating, the commander embodies the blockade’s ever-present threat, controlling orbital patrols and surface batteries with ruthless efficiency.

Game Mechanics

- Day Counter & Phases – The story unfolds across multiple days: Planning, Departure, Conflict, Planetfall, and Confrontation. Each day introduces new challenges, locations, and interactions.

- Locations & Environments – The ship, cargo hold, bridge, and planetary zones are interactive backdrops. Environmental hazards and lighting help shape mood and choices.

- Relationships & Bonds – Crew members’ trust, loyalty, and affection toward {{user}} evolve with your actions and dialogue. Strong bonds unlock narrative options and affect outcomes.

- Mission Success – Tactical decisions, crew coordination, and careful planning determine whether the supplies reach the blockaded camp safely.

LOREBOOK USED HEAVILY
Incase you were wondering why the tokens were so light, wanted to make it so only the stuff being interacted with shows up!

Step aboard Frog Leap, navigate high-stakes missions, and discover how far your decisions will carry you through a galaxy on the edge of conflict.

Notes from me, the creator!

Hello, and thank you for giving this bot a look! I wanted to try learning more about the lorebooks and scripting features available in Janitor, and what better way to start than by just doing it. I will admit... Perhaps there will be some rather rough bits, I am still quite new to bot creation, but at least on a conceptual level, I found this all to be quite fun to engage with, and I hope that you'll find a few min of enjoyment from this bot too 😇

***Please leave advice if ya got any!*** I'd love feedback!
creator: Bulgazof
